debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
h₀ : 4 ≤ n
⊢ n ^ 2 ≤ n.factorial

proof:
induction' h₀ with k hk IH
  · norm_num
  · rw [factorial_succ, pow_two]
    apply Nat.mul_le_mul_left
    apply le_trans _ IH
    rw [pow_two]
    apply le_trans (Nat.add_le_add_left (le_trans (by norm_num : 1 ≤ 4) hk) k)
    rw [← Nat.mul_two]
    apply Nat.mul_le_mul_left k
    exact le_trans (by norm_num : 2 ≤ 4) hk
successful_attempts:
induction' h₀ with k hk IH
  · norm_num
  · rw [factorial_succ, pow_two]
    apply Nat.mul_le_mul_left
    apply le_trans _ IH
    rw [pow_two]
    apply le_trans (Nat.add_le_add_left (le_trans (by norm_num : 1 ≤ 4) hk) k)
    rw [← Nat.mul_two]
    apply Nat.mul_le_mul_left k
    exact le_trans (by norm_num : 2 ≤ 4) hk
